description_long: This object is a standard-sized cigarette, featuring a cylindrical shape with a white paper-wrapped body and a distinct yellow-orange filter tip speckled with small white dots. The filter end is slightly textured, while the opposite end is rounded and appears unburnt, with no visible ash or charring. The cigarette is seamless, with a thin dark line demarcating the filter from the tobacco-filled section. The paper surface is smooth and matte, and the filter is slightly rougher in appearance. There are no visible brand logos, emblems, or text on the exterior. The object is compact and lightweight, typical of a single cigarette found in urban environments.
description: A white cylindrical cigarette with a yellow-orange speckled filter and a smooth paper body, unburnt and unmarked.
description_view_0: The cigarette is viewed head-on from the filter end, showing the yellow-orange speckled filter as a circular face.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the cigarette, with the white body and yellow-orange filter clearly separated by a thin dark line.
description_view_2: The cigarette is viewed from the rounded, unburnt tip, showing the white paper end as a circular face.
description_view_3: Another side profile, opposite to view 1, again showing the white body and yellow-orange filter, with the filter on the right.
